business.name: Atlas Gadget Hub
business.description: Moroccan electronics and accessories store focused on affordable smartphones, audio gear, mobile accessories, and smart home gadgets.

conditions: Product must be unused and returned with original packaging.
Opened audio accessories can only be returned if defective.
Refunds are processed within 5 business days after inspection.

delivery.tracking_method: WhatsApp confirmation message with tracking reference when the courier updates the shipment.

orders.handoff_policy: Order status, changes, cancellations, and complaints are handled manually by the support team via WhatsApp, phone, or email during business hours.
